odoo_app: Website eCommerce + Sales (website_sale, sale.order draft→sent→sale→cancel; see docs/parity/references/ecommerce-odoo.md)

capabilities.name: Public storefront (shop, product detail, product blocks)
capabilities.verify: src/pages/ShopPage.tsx + src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx + src/components/public/blocks/ProductsBlock.tsx / FeaturedProductBlock.tsx; browse_products + manage_product skills in src/lib/modules/products-module.ts (module id 'ecommerce', L582)
capabilities.notes: Long-shipped core; digital-shop template seeds a working shop (src/data/templates/digital-shop.ts).

capabilities.name: Variant selection on the public product page
capabilities.verify: Built 2026-07-04 (code-cited, no live runtime evidence yet): src/hooks/useProductVariants.ts (anon-RLS reads of product_variants + attribute joins, resolveVariant combination matcher) + attribute pill selectors in src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx (price = base + price_delta_cents, variant image/SKU/stock); CartContext carries variantId/variantLabel (lines keyed on product+variant, old carts still parse); listing surfaces (ShopPage/ProductsBlock/FeaturedProductBlock) route variant products to the product page via useVariantProductIds; CheckoutPage passes variantId → create-checkout writes order_items.variant_id and reprices variant items server-side (base+delta, price_data line for Stripe)
capabilities.notes: Closes the EPIC-01 frontend gap (backend was 100% ready). Flip to done after Stage-3: place a variant order on a live instance and confirm order_items.variant_id + charged price. Odoo shows variants as selectable options on the product page (reference card §7).

capabilities.name: Persistent cart (block, page, sidebar)
capabilities.verify: src/contexts/CartContext.tsx (localStorage persistence, guest-capable) + src/components/public/blocks/CartBlock.tsx + src/pages/CartPage.tsx + src/components/public/CartSidebar.tsx; admin editor CartBlockEditor.tsx
capabilities.notes: Client-side cart; unlike Odoo the cart is NOT a draft order in the DB until checkout is initiated (impacts abandoned-cart reach, see abandoned_cart_recovery).

capabilities.name: Guest checkout (no account required)
capabilities.verify: src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx L20-33 (name+email only, auto-fill when signed in) → supabase/functions/create-checkout (userId optional, guest orders keyed by customer_email)
capabilities.notes: Matches Odoo's guest policy (reference card §2). Checkout DEPTH gaps are scored separately (address, delivery, tax).

capabilities.name: Delivery/billing address collection at checkout
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3 evidence): drove a real sandbox checkout via create-checkout with a shippingAddress on a weighted product (718268d9, weight_grams=1500) → order 4c0432bf-6a59-4ebe-bb68-5c068e80c142 created, then verified the orders row carried every column: shipping_name='EPIC05 Address Test', shipping_address_line1='Testgatan 1', shipping_postal_code='11122', shipping_city='Stockholm', shipping_country='SE'. Test order cancelled after the run. Mechanism: migration 20260704130000_checkout-completion.sql adds nullable orders.shipping_name/_address_line1/_line2/_postal_code/_city/_country (default 'SE')/_phone; CheckoutPage.tsx renders a delivery-address section required only when the cart contains a weighted (shippable) product; create-checkout writes the columns in both sandbox and live paths (buildShippingColumns); shown on admin OrdersPage detail dialog (Delivery block) and customer portal account/OrdersPage expanded row
capabilities.notes: Delivery address only — no separate billing address (Stripe collects billing at payment; SMB scope). Odoo's Delivery step captures delivery + billing address (reference card §2).

capabilities.name: Online card payment (Stripe Checkout) with webhook-confirmed payment
capabilities.verify: supabase/functions/create-checkout/index.ts L196-405 (Stripe session, auto-creates prices, writes orders+order_items) + supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts L339-410 (checkout.session.completed → orders.status='paid', order.paid webhook)
capabilities.notes: Prior runtime evidence: products.json#order_lines_normalized Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11 with create-checkout (sandbox+Stripe). Single provider (card via Stripe) vs Odoo's multi-provider surface — sufficient at SMB depth.

capabilities.name: Offline/manual payment option (wire transfer / pay later)
capabilities.verify: Sandbox mode in create-checkout/index.ts L113-194 places orders without online payment (status pending/paid via sandboxAutoPayDays)
capabilities.notes: Partial: sandbox is a test mode, not a customer-facing 'pay by bank transfer' method with instructions + pending-payment workflow (Odoo wire transfer, reference card §3).

capabilities.name: Order lifecycle (pending → paid → fulfilled / failed / refunded)
capabilities.verify: orders table baseline.sql L14799-14823 (status default 'pending', fulfillment_status default 'unfulfilled'); transitions: stripe-webhook (paid L373-381, failed L439-462, refunded L412-437), admin OrdersPage.tsx status updates + audit, fulfill_order_line RPC (migration 20260610180000) auto-ships when all lines complete
capabilities.notes: Mirrors Odoo's draft→sale skeleton with payment as the confirming event (sale_order.py L41-46). Enforced in code — no DB CHECK constraint on orders.status (hardening candidate, not a parity gap).

capabilities.name: Order confirmation email on payment
capabilities.verify: supabase/functions/send-order-confirmation/index.ts (HTML receipt from order+order_items, sends via email-send, stamps orders.confirmation_sent_at) — invoked by stripe-webhook on checkout.session.completed L391-402
capabilities.notes: Live-Stripe path only: sandbox orders never trigger it (create-checkout sandbox path does not call it) — close that gap when touching checkout. No separate 'shipped' email (Odoo has one, reference card §5).

capabilities.name: Admin order management + fulfillment (stepper, per-line, tracking)
capabilities.verify: src/pages/admin/OrdersPage.tsx (list, filters, bulk + single status updates, audit) + src/components/admin/orders/FulfillmentStepper.tsx / FulfillmentActions.tsx (tracking number/url) / OrderLineFulfillment.tsx (fulfill_order_line RPC)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 evidence: products.json#partial_shipments verified 2026-06-11 (fulfill_order_line via agent-execute; UI = OrderLineFulfillment). Covers Odoo's pick→pack→ship delivery-order skeleton at SMB depth.

capabilities.name: Customer portal: order status + history
capabilities.verify: src/pages/account/OrdersPage.tsx (order list + expandable line items + status badges via useCustomerOrders/useCustomerOrderItems) + CustomerAuthPage.tsx (email/password customer auth) + public src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx for guests; skill surface = check_order_status / lookup_order
capabilities.notes: Partial: Odoo's portal also shows invoices and delivery tracking on the order (reference card §6) — FlowWink's account portal shows orders only (no invoice list, no tracking links there; tracking lives on the separate public OrderTrackingPage).

capabilities.name: Delivery method selection + shipping cost at checkout
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3 evidence): configured a PostNord carrier + a Standard (0-2kg) rate at 4900 cents via manage_carrier + manage_shipping_rate skills; list_shipping_options(1500,'SEK') then returned the PostNord option (price_cents=4900); drove a shippable checkout (weighted product 718268d9=1500g) passing shippingRateId → create-checkout's resolveShipping re-resolved the rate server-side and order 435e8d47-3b51-4c88-ba88-bf916be35fc4 carried shipping_method='PostNord — Standard (0-2kg)', shipping_cost_cents=4900, total_cents=22900 (18000 item + 4900 shipping). Test order cancelled; the demo carrier+rate left in place as legitimate instance config. Also confirmed the graceful-degradation path earlier: with no rates configured, list_shipping_options returns [] and checkout is not blocked. Mechanism: migration 20260704130000 adds products.weight_grams + anon-granted list_shipping_options RPC + orders.shipping_method/shipping_cost_cents; CheckoutPage.tsx renders options as radio choices (cheapest pre-selected); create-checkout re-resolves the chosen rate server-side and charges shipping as its own Stripe line item in live mode; orders.total_cents includes shipping
capabilities.notes: Dimensional weight not wired (cart has no parcel dimensions) — actual grams only. Live-run learning: delivery_choice was gated on instance data (no carriers/rates), not code — configuring one rate flipped it. Odoo: flat/rule-based/carrier rates picked at the Delivery step (reference card §4).

capabilities.name: Abandoned-cart/checkout recovery email
capabilities.verify: cart_recovery_check skill (src/lib/modules/products-module.ts L484-508) lists abandoned/incomplete (pending) orders for agent-driven recovery
capabilities.notes: Partial: agent skill over stale pending orders only — no delay config, no automated recovery email/cron (Odoo: cart_abandoned_delay + recovery template + sent-flag, website_sale/models/sale_order.py L26-81). Since carts are localStorage, only visitors who reached checkout are recoverable at all.

capabilities.name: Discount/promo codes at checkout
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3 evidence): (1) operator created code EPICVERIFY10 (10% percent, max_uses 5) via execute_skill manage_discount_code — skill resolves post skills-sync; (2) drove a real sandbox checkout via create-checkout with discountCode=EPICVERIFY10 on an 18000-cent item → order 1fe46ebe-9bb7-4e94-9021-d4a117d3fb8b created status=paid; (3) verified orders.total_cents=16200, discount_cents=1800 (exactly 10%), discount_code=EPICVERIFY10, discount_code_id set; (4) verified redeem: manage_discount_code get → use_count=1. Code deactivated after the run. Mechanism: migration 20260704120000_discount-codes.sql (discount_codes table, case-insensitive unique code, percent|fixed, window/max_uses/min_order; orders.discount_code/_cents/_code_id; validate_discount_code RPC granted to anon, redeem_discount_code atomic increment, manage_discount_code admin RPC) + checkout UI apply/remove in src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx + server-side enforcement in supabase/functions/create-checkout (re-validates, stores net total_cents + discount fields, sandbox redeems on order insert) + stripe-webhook redeems on pending→paid + admin Discounts tab (src/components/admin/DiscountCodesManager.tsx) + manage_discount_code skill (rpc:) in src/lib/modules/products-module.ts
capabilities.notes: SMB scope per reference card §9: plain code → percent/fixed discount; loyalty stack stays a non-goal. Live-run note: manage_discount_code is a new skill and was initially invisible to the MCP gateway because a hand-sync missed mcp_exposed=true; the fix is the admin 'Sync skills from code' 4th-layer deploy (re-bootstraps mcp_exposed from module defs), after which the skill resolved and the E2E passed.

capabilities.name: VAT/tax handling + incl./excl. price display (B2C vs B2B)
capabilities.verify: Built 2026-07-04 (code-cited, no live runtime evidence yet): shop-wide setting on the ecommerce module config (vatRatePct + pricesIncludeVat in useModules.tsx ModuleConfig, admin UI in ModuleDetailSheet.tsx 'VAT Display' card); src/hooks/useVatDisplay.ts (anon-safe site_settings read) renders 'inkl. moms (X%)' / 'exkl. moms (X%)' next to prices/totals on ProductDetailPage, CartPage and CheckoutPage; create-checkout stamps metadata.vat {rate_pct, prices_include_vat, vat_cents = total×rate/(100+rate) when inclusive} on the order in both sandbox and live paths for the invoice side
capabilities.notes: Display + provenance only, deliberately no tax engine: prices are never recalculated, one shop-wide rate (Odoo's B2C incl / B2B excl toggle, reference card §8). vatRatePct=0/unset = feature off. Invoice-side consumption (send_invoice_for_order reading metadata.vat instead of hardcoded 0.25) is a follow-up. Flip to done after Stage-3 on a live storefront.

capabilities.name: Generate/send invoice from an order
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: send_invoice_for_order registered (commit 43223301, was missing from products-module skills[]) + synced to dev; Stage-3 live over gateway — built INV-0028 (22500) from an order, second call returned the SAME invoice_id (idempotent). UI: 'Create invoice' action on admin OrdersPage (→ send_invoice_for_order, 'View invoice' when one exists).
capabilities.notes: Registration + admin action both fixed 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: Refund handling on orders
capabilities.verify: stripe-webhook charge.refunded L412-437 → orders.status='refunded' + order.refunded webhook; admin OrdersPage can set status refunded
capabilities.notes: Partial: refunds initiated in Stripe are recorded, but admin cannot initiate a Stripe refund from FlowWink. RMA/returns flow is scored separately in returns.json — not double-counted here.

capabilities.name: Click & collect / in-store pickup option
capabilities.verify: No pickup option at checkout
capabilities.notes: Odoo Click & Collect (reference card §4). Low weight: relevant only to shops with a physical counter; single-warehouse version would suffice.

capabilities.name: Multi-website shops (per-website pricelists/providers)
capabilities.verify: n/a
capabilities.notes: Non-goal: FlowWink is single-tenant, one site per deployment by design — Odoo's multi-website machinery is enterprise-scale, out of SMB scope (proposed 2026-07-04, pending program-owner sign-off; reference card §10).

capabilities.name: Loyalty points, eWallets, gift cards, buy-X-get-Y
capabilities.verify: n/a
capabilities.notes: Non-goal: full loyalty stack is enterprise-retail scope; plain discount_codes (scored above) covers the SMB case (proposed 2026-07-04, pending sign-off; reference card §9/§10).

capabilities.name: Express-checkout wallet buttons (Apple/Google Pay)
capabilities.verify: n/a
capabilities.notes: Non-goal candidate: conversion nice-to-have, not gating for SMB parity; revisit if Stripe Checkout's built-in wallet support makes it free (proposed 2026-07-04, pending sign-off; reference card §10).

capabilities.name: Agent-operable order flow (place_order, manage_orders, cart_recovery_check via FlowPilot/MCP)
capabilities.verify: place_order (module:orders → create-checkout), manage_orders, lookup_order, check_order_status, fulfill_order_line, cart_recovery_check in src/lib/modules/products-module.ts skillSeeds
capabilities.notes: FlowWink differentiator — Odoo has no autonomous operator running the shop; excluded from parity denominator per schema.
